textByHash.4542a0f8741c2bdce56a52731158f445fb002e19: Something attacked me in the dark... I can't move much...
textByHash.195daa067d8b63635b47968c221a590d20369221: That would be much appreciated! There should be a couple of plants around to make a poultice... Hold it together with an embertailed jerboa tail, and...
textByHash.af5f58470501279fd5b93d9f2aee7a6f472da8d1: There should be a couple of plants around to make a... make a...
textByHash.8c7ceb9f824f7f4fdccbfa0f52e1bce48d4157e4: It's a bit fuzzy... I've lost a lot of blood! One should be around here... the other may be near the oasis... with the capybabas... [laugh], capybaras...
textByHash.7d6601369ccc59fbe4031d639fd4773e1794540e: A poultice! And hold it together with the tail from an embertailed jerboa.
textByHash.b7b35fc17c1a9991d302b875b8466d76cbef26a7: Don't forget... your traps for the jerboa... they're boxy...
textByHash.cf647f76cb1e2aa9002314a0cbb2789961c5fdaf: How's that poul... pool... poultice... Did you find the plants?
textByHash.26be9ff74ce11e4abc1f2a2c93cdc0e07d81617d: It doesn't look like you do... Who's the one with the head wound again?
textByHash.b7e3a040b38f9e72db5c123b8c7b53b6ed4dcd5f: Kuani! That's making a difference already.
textByHash.be473037377893ef80afbb941689ec6d07aadacf: I thought a little detour wouldn't hurt. I'd caught a glimpse of the most stunning pelt ever seen!
textByHash.aa06dce78f533f34c24b92e7579ffc83a7bfda31: As I was tracking it, I was attacked and knocked out. When I came to, it was gone.
textByHash.c2d1a13a9413899ff8ba198ac6f67d5d68606520: Without a trace, as well as most of my hunting equipment.
textByHash.238349ee11713927e353655bb33451fb4666d2e8: You've already done me a huge favour, but I don't suppose I could ask for one more small one?
textByHash.9032333807cf7517883bc062b376baa9ce84abb1: Well it's your lucky day! Make some room and I'll give you the sample needed to fix the bed.
textByHash.4e63c6c0c7ad615752f24751952b367729d95668: Well it's your lucky day! Take this sample to a woman called Atza in Outer Fortis. She'll have exactly what we need.
textByHash.eb7f108c8831e86dc437c3bbef4a8ad22937a4e1: She lives by the south western gate of the city. She'll be able to give us the matching fur to repair the cat's bed with.
textByHash.209e82bc4a1dd34a7ebb04a8d366401249dcd5d4: If you're struggling to find her, she's in Outer Fortis, near the south western gate.
textByHash.34996c16277cbacafde69c4a389766303a66e539: Luckily, I always come prepared. Here's a spare.
textByHash.2ad3f0ba6550952ddc9f78fcac4c2cdcde2bb258: Well I'm not going anywhere. Let me know when you do have room.
textByHash.c977b21822d79cae8bc1eae3d60269f0f97c6399: Fortunately for you, I'm always prepared... And our thief clearly didn't care for fine fur samples.
textByHash.558324833cd9c2e0147bb9d9bb70357691a225a5: Did she give you the matching material?
textByHash.c5256e77f3551465858a383f71b74aa329fbba68: She didn't make you do odd jobs for her, did she?
textByHash.c4808452f8a27f566c3ef7a5d9c933dce389eab1: She does it every time I visit!
textByHash.cf12e845c73d6e86397503a4568967628df84c01: Now, I'll need you to take this report back to Verity, but it looks like you don't have space for it at the moment.
textByHash.ea795621bf4b5d294e3071068596f4106e983416: Anyway, now that's that, would you mind letting Wolf and Verity know I'm okay? Oh, and can you take my report back to the guild?
textByHash.ec3e6dd2848e581868feb090041b3042478a185b: Please apologise to Verity for the condition it's in. Oh, and of course, don't forget to use that fur along with another embertailed jerboa tail to fix Kiko's bed!
textByHash.f2a4574b95d564f4084b76b3cde41790f4d0721b: No need! You've already saved my world by making Kiko happy.
textByHash.237c591a3557ae8b2536521f6252516fd8fa6b26: How is it you've lost the report and yet you somehow don't have space for another one?
textByHash.03030e66a35f5d518d7ae7d93fcfd8cfde5b9f7f: You're lucky I don't have anywhere else to be. I'll write you another one. Just a moment...
textByHash.27314faf9413db59bb990cdf4363f3f9e5efa63b: Hello there. Have you taken that report back to Verity yet?
textByHash.1a0b02d7f35782d0982c0884e9098cbb28567c21: Hello there, hunter. Thank you for helping me out of my little predicament, and more importantly, thank you for sorting out Kiko's bed!
